title: ClimaticEvents
description: Extreme weather events to add an extra layer of difficulty
body:
![ClimaticEvents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011a0ba97a58884eb1d9136c5c7a6b46a17f34e6.png)

**ClimaticEvents** is the ultimate plugin to add a touch of **difficulty** and excitement to Minecraft server. With this plugin, you will be able to experience unique and dynamic weather events that will challenge your players and offer them an unforgettable gaming experience.

## Features

- **[🌩️] Custom weather events:** Implement events such as solar flares, acid rain and more.
  
- **[🛠️] Flexible configuration:** Adjust the frequency, duration and effects of each event through intuitive configuration files.
  
- **[🎁] Special chest drops:** During events, chests containing valuables treasures will drop from the sky, offering rewards for those brave enough to claim them.
  
- **[💪] Epic bosses:** Bosses feature unique abilities and exclusive drops that will test your players' skills and add an extra level of challenge and excitement to each event.
  
- **[🖥️] GUI:** The plugin features an inventory panel to better manage the different in-game events and configure quickly.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Solar flare
![SolarFlare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15cd7f5883c6a67f8f5341627155cc4d0c9fcf36.gif)

### Acid rain
![AcidRain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec09f9a7f7b827f3e9058a753c36f95cad1fbfa2.gif)

</details>

## PlaceholderAPI

```%climaticevents_next_event%```- Displays the remaining days to the next event
  
```%climaticevents_current_mode%```- Displays the current difficulty mode

## Commands and Permissions


All commands start with **"/climaticevents"** or **"/ce"**

**Global permission:** climaticevents.admin

### Subcommands:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **reload:** Reload the plugin configuration.
- **permission:** climaticevents.reload
  
- **resetdays:** Reload the days interval.
- **permission:** climaticevents.resetdays
  
- **startevent:** Start a random event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.startevent
  
- **forcesolarflare:** Start the solar flare event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.startevent
  
- **forceacidrain:** Start the acid rain event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.startevent
  
- **forceelectricstorm:** Start the electric storm event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.startevent
  
- **cancelevent:** Cancel the current event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.cancelevent
  
- **nextevent:** Show the days remaining for the next event.
- **permission:** climaticevents.nextevent
  
- **spawnsolarboss:** Spawn the solar boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.spawnboss
  
- **spawnrainboss:** Spawn the rain boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.spawnboss
  
- **spawnstormboss:** Spawn the storm boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.spawnboss
  
- **killsolarboss:** Kill the solar boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.killboss
  
- **killrainboss:** Kill the rain boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.killboss
  
- **killstormboss:** Kill the storm boss.
- **permission:** climaticevents.killboss
  
- **chest:** Spawn chest drop.
- **permission:** climaticevents.chest
  
- **killchest:** Remove chest drop.
- **permission:** climaticevents.killchest
  
- **on:** Enable plugin.
- **permission:** climaticevents.toggle
  
- **off:** Disable plugin.
- **permission:** climaticevents.toggle
  
- **panel:** Open manager panel.
- **permission:** climaticevents.panel
  
- **mode:** change mode.
- **permission:** climaticevents.mode

</details>
